# License — illustrations-blush

## Upstream

- Platform: Blush Design — https://blush.design
- Illustrators: multiple independent artists who license collections through Blush (credited per-collection on their site).
- Public preview images: PNG renders published on the marketing / collection pages, served via CDN.
- Licensing: Blush free tier permits personal use with attribution; commercial and SVG export are paid. These files are preview renders served publicly.

## Acquisition note

Scraped public preview PNGs from blush.design collection showcase pages via standard HTTP fetches. No paid content downloaded. No account circumvention. No SVG extraction (gated).

## Use in Clawmachine

Internal non-commercial preview use by a single UK operator (Regan Cooney) for a private electronics fix-and-flip tool. If any Blush artwork is carried forward into the shipped Clawmachine, a paid Blush license must be acquired for that specific collection before distribution.

Fair use position for current internal-prototype stage: preview PNGs used for mood-board / layout exploration only, not redistributed, not published.
